input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.5.5.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.5.5.1
            TITLE: b. if the fuel level changes after refuelling:

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.5.5.1: b. If the fuel level changes after refuelling:
IC.5.5.1  
b. If the fuel level changes after refuelling: 
• Additional fuel will be added to return the fuel tank level to the fuel level line.  
• Twice this amount will be added to the previously measured fuel consumption 
c. If damage or a potential environmental hazard (example - Fuel Tank leakage) exists, the 
Fuel Tank will not be refilled  D.13.3.4

final_answer: rule IC.5.5.1: b. If the fuel level changes after refuelling: IC.5.5.1 b. If the fuel level changes after refuelling: • Additional fuel will be added to return the fuel tank level to the fuel level line. • Twice this amount will be added to the previously measured fuel consumption c. If damage or a potential environmental hazard (example - Fuel Tank leakage) exists, the Fuel Tank will not be refilled D.13.3.4
